name: mavrick
description: Connect Codex to a scoped Mavrick instance.

interface.shortDescription: Use scoped Mavrick tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex terminal sessions to Mavrick through user-controlled scoped API tokens. Codex must use /api/codex/* endpoints so Mavrick Settings can enforce tool access.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Mavrick only through configured scoped access. Check capabilities before reading or writing data.
